tools.name: register_endpoint
tools.description: Register an API endpoint to monitor for schema changes. Provide name, url, and optionally method/headers/description.

tools.name: list_monitored_endpoints
tools.description: List all registered API endpoints being monitored.

tools.name: compare_snapshots
tools.description: Fetch a registered endpoint and compare against its last snapshot to detect schema changes. Or compare two inline JSON objects directly.

tools.name: get_diff_history
tools.description: Retrieve the schema diff history for a registered endpoint.

tools.name: detect_breaking_changes
tools.description: Check if a registered endpoint has had any breaking changes (removed fields or type changes).

tools.name: delete_endpoint
tools.description: Remove a monitored endpoint and all its snapshots and diff history.
